title: FileSystem
description: FileSystem schema from Amazon EFS Amazon Elastic File System (EFS) API

FileSystemId.description: The ID of the file system.

FileSystemArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the file system.

CreationToken.description: The opaque string specified in the request.

OwnerId.description: The AWS account that created the file system.

CreationTime.description: The time that the file system was created.

LifeCycleState.description: The lifecycle phase of the file system.

Name.description: The value of the Name tag if set.

NumberOfMountTargets.description: The current number of mount targets that the file system has.

Value.description: The latest known metered size of data stored in the file system, in bytes.

SizeInBytes.description: The latest known metered size of data stored in the file system.

PerformanceMode.description: The performance mode of the file system.

Encrypted.description: A Boolean value that, if true, indicates that the file system is encrypted.

KmsKeyId.description: The ID of the KMS key used for encryption.

ThroughputMode.description: Displays the throughput mode for the file system.

ProvisionedThroughputInMibps.description: The amount of provisioned throughput, in MiB/s.

Tags.description: The tags associated with the file system.
